lines.english: We have an old musical instrument.
lines.raw: We have an old musical instrument. |

lines.english: It was made in Germany in 1681.
lines.raw: It was made in Germany in 1681. |

lines.english: Our clavichord is kept in the living room.
lines.raw: Our clavichord is kept in the living room. |

lines.english: It has belonged to our family for a long time.
lines.raw: It has belonged to our family for a long time. |

lines.english: The instrument was bought by my grandfather many years ago.
lines.raw: The instrument was bought by my grandfather many years ago. |

lines.english: Recently it was damaged by a visitor.
lines.raw: Recently it was damaged by a visitor. |

lines.english: She tried to play jazz on it!
lines.raw: She tried to play jazz on it! |

lines.english: She struck the keys too hard and two of the strings were broken.
lines.raw: She struck the keys too hard and two of the strings were broken. |

lines.english: Now we are not allowed to touch it.
lines.raw: Now we are not allowed to touch it. |

lines.english: It is being repaired by a friend of my father's.
lines.raw: It is being repaired by a friend of my father's. |
